features.name: immediate assertion with signal-edge sensitivity
features.description: Code should include an immediate assertion inside an always block with signal-edge sensitivity (@(signal))

features.name: concurrent assertion with clocking block
features.description: Code should include a concurrent assertion using assert property with clocking (@(posedge clk))
features.snippet: a3 : assert property (@(posedge pclk) pselx)  else $error ("a3");

features.name: assertion failure reporting with $error
features.description: Code should include assertion with else $error clause for failure reporting

features.name: timing control with delay in initial block
features.description: Code should include timing control with #delay in initial block to control when signals change
